task_completion.description: Open and read the coroner notification file.

The NOSH ChartingSystem dashboard or interface is visible, indicating a successful login (e.g., logged in as 'admin').

task_completion.description: Search for and open the correct patient's record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The patient chart or demographics page for 'Albert Zweig' (DOB: 1955-03-12) is open in the NOSH interface.

task_completion.description: Update the patient's status to deceased.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A status field, checkbox, or dropdown in the patient's demographics/record is set to 'Deceased' or a similar indicator.

task_completion.description: Enter the accurate date of death.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The date '2025-11-30' (or equivalent format like '11/30/2025') is entered into the 'Date of Death' or similar field in the patient's record.
A success notification, a saved state of the demographics page, or the patient header reflecting the deceased status and date of death without unsaved changes.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the NOSH web interface rather than using terminal commands or API scripts to update the database.

integrity.description: The agent actually opened the notification file rather than guessing or hallucinating the details.
